summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Emergency & War Survival Guide PWA. All major features tested and working correctly including navigation, survival guides, checklist, SOS functionality, map integration, contacts management, timer, compass, and multi-language support.

minor_issues.issue: Morse code transmission may require device permissions or work better on mobile devices
minor_issues.note: Functionality is present but may need device-specific permissions for flashlight/torch access

minor_issues.issue: Device orientation compass requires mobile device or specific browser permissions
minor_issues.note: Shows static compass on desktop, would work with device orientation on mobile

passed_tests: Home page loads with all feature cards (Survival Guides, Go-Bag, SOS, Emergency Map)
Navigation bar works and highlights active page
All 7 survival guide categories display correctly
Survival guides expand and show step-by-step instructions
Search functionality works in guides
Checklist page displays all categories (Essentials, Water, Food, Medical, Tools, Documents, Clothing)
Checklist items can be checked/unchecked and progress updates
Custom items can be added to checklist
SOS page main button is visible and functional
Custom message input and morse code preview works
MapLibre GL JS map loads successfully
Map marker type buttons are visible and functional
Map markers can be added and saved
Contacts page add/edit/delete functionality works
Contact form validation and data persistence works
Timer page countdown functionality works
Timer preset buttons work correctly
Compass page displays compass rose and heading
Language selector works with 5 language options
Multi-language switching works correctly
All navigation between pages works smoothly
LocalStorage data persistence works across all features
